name: dataset-aggregator
label: Dataset Aggregator
description: Aggregates most recent FW datasets across centers
author: NACC

duplicates_criteria_json.description: Optional JSON file mapping tables to list of fields to match duplicates on. If provided, two rows are considered a duplicate for a given table if ALL fields in the list match. If a table has no duplicate criteria, all rows will be kept.

target_project.description: Target project to aggregate datasets from.

output_uri.description: S3 path of where aggregated results should be written to.

dry_run.description: Whether to do a dry run

apikey_path_prefix.description: The instance specific AWS parameter path prefix for apikey

include_centers.description: Comma separated list of centers to include in batch run

exclude_centers.description: Comma separated list of centers to exclude from batch run

exclude_studies.description: Comma separated list of study suffixes to exclude from batch run

freeze_date.description: Freeze date, in YYYYMMDD format; will use the ETL date (time of execution) if not provided

debug.description: Whether or not to use debug-level logging (level set to DEBUG)
